## CSS Loader for Millennium v1.2.2

This release restores stock CSS Loader target matching across Millennium's
direct-injection runtime.

### Complete target matching

- Publishes each resolved injection with an explicit target type and value.
- Preserves regular-expression title targets and anchors them against the full
  document title, matching stock CSS Loader behavior.
- Preserves `~value~` targets as page-URL substring matches.
- Preserves `!value` targets as HTML class matches.
- Uses stable, collision-resistant identifiers for custom title, URL, and class
  targets.

### Update compatibility

- Retains the protocol-v1 `matchRegex` field so the backend and companion can
  update independently without breaking existing title-targeted styling.
- Adds compiler coverage for title, URL, and class serialization alongside the
  existing runtime, profile, asset, and process-control tests.

Install CSS Loader Companion v1.2.1 separately for full Store, Community, and
other isolated BrowserView support. Themes, profiles, settings, and the selected
Millennium theme remain unchanged.
